title: RENACH process state machine and exam eligibility rules
statement: RENACH transactional endpoints enforce the process state machine (ABERTO → AGUARDANDO_MEDICO → AGENDADO → EM_EXAME → EXAME_REGISTRADO → {AGUARDANDO_PSICOLOGICO|EM_ANALISE|APROVADO|REJEITADO}, with ENCAMINHADO_JUNTA branch). Business rules RENACH.R001–R010 are enforced: an invalid transition or rule violation yields 402 with the domain code in the message; an unknown process yields 404. Exam type must match process type; clinic and examiner must be accredited/active/linked; INAPTO blocks progress pending board.
rationale: The transactional half of the mock must behave like the real RENACH workflow so pec/teat can exercise licensing flows deterministically, including the rejection and board-referral branches.
